itemListElement.reviewBody: The best schooling I could ever imagine of getting... Really thankful to all the teachers for helping us carve a bright future... 6years of study, development and enjoyment...have spent the golden era of my life there... Gathered loads of memories to cherish. Miss my school days so bad!

itemReviewed.name: Sree Sarada Ashrama Balika Bidyalaya - New Alipore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I passed my Madhyamik from this school (1977 batch) and used to live in Ashrama as a boarder. The school had a reputation for discipline ,and strictness. I don't know  its  position in the ranking list of schools. But it is the best ever school in my memory.
I can never forget the affection and sincerity  I got from the then  Headmistress (Reba Di), the strict English teacher (Gouri Di) and Bengali teacher ( Dipti Di) and all others. Some of  the teachers  would voluntarily work extra time to groom us. Ashram Mata  Anila Di' was a real mother figure.

itemReviewed.name: Sree Sarada Ashrama Balika Bidyalaya - New Alipore

itemListElement.reviewBody: I like the school my sister read in this school.. I haved also passed from this school and my life has totally changed.. Now I am doing job in London

itemReviewed.name: Sree Sarada Ashrama Balika Bidyalaya - New Alipore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I passed my Madhyamik from this school (2017 batch). The school had a reputation for discipline ,and strictness. I don't how its position in the ranking list of schools. But it is the best ever school in my memory.I had spent a lot of time in this school with full of fun and guidance of teacher....
After spending 10 years in this school I realised how much grateful I should be to my parents for admitting me in the school. Not only because I'm a student of this school, rather an ex-student of this school, but as a genuine student I'm saying it's the best school indeed. We've wondered a lot in these years that why do the teachers give us so much pressure and why do we have to abide by so many rules. At times these seemed exessexce to us too. No other school of WB board includes the whole madhyamik's syllabus in pretest, no other school includes weekly tests. We used to wonder then do we have to do all these? But now at this point of time, after coming out of this school more or less all of us are realising how much lucky werew being a student of sree Sarada ashrama. I take so much pride when someone says "she's from sarada ashrama" because of our discipline. Believe me I'm a normal student but our teachers' guidance has made me score good marks. Now imI realising that our Teachers' strictness was actually their affection. Can't thank Sree Sarada Ashrama Balika Vidyalaya enough for all these. I'm really proud to be a student of this school. ItsI the best school indeed.
I can never forget the affection and sincerity I got from the then Headmistress (Sutapa di), the strict English teacher (Subhra Di) And p.t  teacher (Mala di) and all others. Some of the teachers would voluntarily extra time to groom us. Ashram Mata Anila Di' was a real mother figure.
